roa.docketEntryComment: DA OPP TO DEF MOT TO DISMISS FOR DENIAL OF SPEEDY TRAIL RIGHTS FILED
DEF MOTION TO DISMISS JONES/SERNA FILED
PD MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTION RECALL BW OF 060718 FILED

/TWS/CH1: ISS:CPROB:PROB 18 M:PJ  20 D/CTS: 1/CTORD: THE COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE WILL BE SERVED THROUGH HOME DETENTION AND GPS MONITORING/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO THE SFSD OFFICE TO BE FITTED WITH A GPS MONITOR ONOR BEFORE 5PM ON OCTOBER 3, 2019/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT MAY GO GROCERY SHOPPING AND MAY GO TO MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS WHILE ON HOME DETENTION/PF460 18/IID: 1 YEAR/VF2:150/MOP1: 18 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/CTORD: DUE TO DEFENDANT'S AGE AND FINANCIAL CONDITION ALL FINES AND FEESWILL BE PERMANENTLY STAYED/

/CAL: TRIAL/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X: THE DEFENDNANT ADMITS THEALLEGATION OF THE PRIOR CONVICTION ATTACHED TO COUNT ONE IS TRUE,/

/CAL:TRIAL/NP/DEF:IS ON A STANDBY/LD:09-30-19 WITH GIN WAIVER/X:PEOPLE'STRIAL BRIEF, WITNESS LIST, PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS, AND MOTIONS IN LIMINE IS FILED,/X:BRIEF OPPOSING ADMISSION OF TOXICOLOGY REPORT:REQUEST FOR SECTION 402 HEARING IS FILED,/X:MOTIONS IN LIMINE IS FILED,/X:TRIAL ON 09-30-19 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:THE PEOPLE FILE AND SERVE AN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURS, TO CAL PC 1538,5/X:DEFENDANT ON 2 HOUR STANDBY/LDTR:09-30-19 (GIN FOR ALL PURPOSES)/X:THE CAUSE IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED, TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE VEDICA PURI, SUPERIOR COURT, DEPT 27 ON 09-30-19 AT 9AM/CTORD:PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR IN DEPT 12 AT 1330PM ON 09-26-19 FOR PRETRIAL MOTIONS/SB:2HR/
/CAL:TRIAL/LD:09-16-19/DEF: WANTS TO WAIT FOR PD HOSKINS/X:GIN-JOHNSON WAIVER ENTERED FOR ALL PURPOSES/LD: 09-23-19 NEW LAST DAY/CONTD:TRIAL/DEF:ON 2 HR STANDBY WITH PROOF OF ID PROCESSED/
/CAL:MSC & PD MTS/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 09-06-19/X:AND ADD TRIAL TO CURRENTLY SCHEDULED JONES SERNA MOTION ON 09-09-19/CONTD:JURY TRIAL AND JONES SERNA MOTION/SB:2HR/LDTR:09-16-19/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/BWR:06-07-18/BWR1/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:09-16-19/987,2/CONTD:MSC, DEFENSE ORAL JONES MOTION TO DISMISS & JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/DAWT/X:THE COURT INVOKES THE GIN WAIVER FOR ALL PURPOSESTODAY/LDTR:09-30-19 (GIN FOR ALL PURPOSES)/CONT/SB:2HR/
/CAL:TRIAL & JONES SERNA MOTION/MO DENED/DAWT/LDTR:09-16-19/CONT/X:DOPC FOR GIN/
